untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying downward-sloping trendlines forming a broadening wedge shape, oscillation widening over time, and price rounding at top — all geometric/structural pattern features not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal is context-dependent and requires visual pattern recognition beyond point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy rule: entry SHORT when price falls below SMA_20 (trend reversal from uptrend), volume exceeds 20-day historical average (widening oscillations proxy), and ATR indicates volatility expansion (broadening). Exit when price crosses back above SMA_20. However, this does not capture the actual descending broadening wedge pattern geometry. Author-silent parameters prevent precise rule definition.
